title: patis obtusa
intro: Patis obtusa, also known as Chinese angelica or dong quai, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the carrot family. It is traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include being a natural anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and estrogenic agent. The health benefits of patis obtusa include reducing menstrual cramps and other symptoms associated with PMS, as well as improving circulation and immune function. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, capsules, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being and balance.
